title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: YMCA OF KLAMATH FALLS COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities: aquatic center, gym and group exercise classes, youth and adult sports. Also provides preschool and after-school childcare programs. 1221 S Alameda Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 5am-8pm Email (541) 884-4149 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 884-4149 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship LANGUAGES: Varies by site AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER DAY CAMP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
